text.message: Do you have something to tell me?
Are you in loved with me or what?
He Is upset for the plow
If you can read above sure
I can ask you the same blue
You never leave a brick wood open
I’m not in the mood so you will lose black
I'm not in the mood it's what your wife says to constantly
I was under the impression that Canadians are nice
I take that as a compliment
